steps.title: Set the function equal to 150
steps.content: The question asks when $f(x)=150$. Since $f(x)=50x$, solve $$50x=150.$$

steps.title: Check by substitution
steps.content: Substitute $x=3$ back into the function: $f(3)=50(3)=150$. This matches the required output, so the value of $x$ is 3.
